title: The SCARYRARY Collab!
description:
After many hours of watching, collecting, and patching together entries, I present the Scaryrary Collab! Thanks to the 34 (or so) of you who offered qualified entries. I nearly killed my PC trying to render this 40-minute pile of trash, so please enjoy it!

Intro song: Grim Grinning Ghosts (Blarsa Remix)

To viewers: If you have questions about an entry, such as what song was used, the source, etc. Please go to the user who made the entry in question and ask on their original video (Or send them a message). I will do my best to help you identify songs, link to sources, and explain jokes, but I can only do so much with content that is not my own.

To participants: My advance apologies if you feel your entry was greatly shortened or slightly changed. I assure you all edits were simply to save time and to make you look good for all the watching peoples.

Here is a list of the users invloved. If you like what you see here, go check them out and subscribe. This list is in order of appearance (Or something similar)
